//: F4 SCSS scoping — see docs/roadmap/scss-scoping.md. F4 sweep complete (docs/roadmap/scss-audit-2026-05-03.md, 2026-05-04 closeout): severity bumped to `error` for selector-disallowed-list now that the audit reports 0 violations.

selector-disallowed-list.message: Top-level bare element selectors must be wrapped under the file's owning component class — see docs/roadmap/scss-scoping.md. The audit script (tools/scripts/scss-scope-audit.mjs) enforces the per-file owner-class rule; this stylelint hook gates additional patterns added to the list.

declaration-property-value-disallowed-li.message: Motion durations must come from the token system — use calc(var(--motion-duration-*) * var(--motion-scalar)). See docs/roadmap/admin/motion-token-system.md.

function-disallowed-list.message: Inline cubic-bezier(...) is banned — use var(--motion-ease-*). See docs/roadmap/admin/motion-token-system.md.
